name: Gujarat Social & Infrastructure Crisis Monitor — GigShield

parameters.content:
## Social & Infrastructure Crisis Monitor
GigShield Production v2

RSS Sources (6):
- Gujarat Samachar: Ahmedabad, Baroda, Surat, Gandhinagar, Rajkot
- Google News Gujarat crisis filter

SETUP: Add Gemini credential. Enable 15-min schedule.

JSON PARSER: Resilient v2
- Layer 1: Direct parse
- Layer 2: Trailing comma + missing comma repair
- Layer 3: Object-by-object extraction

WEATHER: 100% EXCLUDED
RSS feeds -> Merge -> Parse/filter -> Gemini AI -> Resilient JSON Parser v2 (3-Layer) -> H3 Geospatial -> HTML Dashboard

parameters.text:
=You are GigShield Social Crisis Analyst for Gujarat, India. Extract ONLY social & infrastructure disruptions.

Fetched: {{ $json.fetchedAt }} | Articles: {{ $json.articleCount }} | Weather-filtered: {{ $json.stats.weatherOut }}

## NEWS ARTICLES:
{{ $json.articles.map(function(a,i){return (i+1)+". ["+a.source+"] "+a.title+" | "+a.description}).join("\n") }}

## ABSOLUTE EXCLUSIONS (reject completely):
Rain, flood, cyclone, heatwave, drought, earthquake, storm, weather, IMD, meteorological, temperature, monsoon. Also: sports, elections, business earnings, entertainment, events outside Gujarat.

## EXTRACT ONLY:
Bandh / Hartal / Strike | Rasta Roko / Chakka Jam | Dharna / Andolan / Protest | Curfew / Section 144 / Police Action | Traffic Jam / Road Block / Bridge Closure / Metro Disruption

## ZONE RULES:
RED: City-wide bandh OR complete curfew OR total road blockade
YELLOW: Localized protest OR heavy traffic OR partial road closure
BLUE: Minor/isolated incident with minimal delivery impact

## OUTPUT FORMAT RULES:
IMPORTANT: Output ONLY raw JSON. Do NOT wrap in markdown code blocks. Do NOT add any text before or after the JSON.
IMPORTANT: Use simple ASCII characters only in crisisSummary. No special quotes or unicode dashes.
IMPORTANT: Ensure every string value uses double quotes and all special characters inside strings are properly escaped.

{"events":[{"city":"Ahmedabad","locality":"Navrangpura","eventCategory":"Bandh","alertZone":"RED","alertEmoji":"\ud83d\udd34","crisisSummary":"City-wide trade bandh affecting all delivery routes.","newsSource":"Gujarat Samachar","latitude":23.0225,"longitude":72.5714}]}

Rules:
- No qualifying events: ONE entry with city=Gujarat, locality=State Wide, alertZone=BLUE, eventCategory=No Active Disruptions
- locality must be specific area or road, not just city name
- crisisSummary in English, max 120 chars, no special unicode chars
- alertEmoji: use \ud83d\udd34 for RED, \ud83d\udfe1 for YELLOW, \ud83d\udfe2 for BLUE
